{
  "files": [

    {"path": "factory-system/tsconfig.json", "content": "{\n  \"compilerOptions\": {\n    \"target\": \"ES2020\",\n    \"module\": \"commonjs\",\n    \"strict\": true,\n    \"esModuleInterop\": true,\n    \"skipLibCheck\": true,\n    \"forceConsistentCasingInFileNames\": true\n  }\n}"},
